message: Sunday... I didn't have anything in particular to do, but I got on the train anyway.
It's not really something unusual for me.
There was just one surprise that made my heart beat about three times faster than normal.
Why did it end up like this?
No... I doubt there's any particular reason.
I just got on the train to go buy a new CD from my favorite voice actor and sat in an open seat.
Then...

name: Mamiya
message: "Um, you're..."
The exact same reaction as when he was on the rooftop.
I could feel my face growing so hot that I just wanted to push him over and run out the doors. Though, why would I need to push him over to do that?
I took a deep breath and said, very naturally...

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh... If it isn't Mamiya-kun." <- Not at all natural!
That's what I said.

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha... What are you doing here?"
After that, I managed to speak a little more calmly... This is becoming a daily ritual every time I meet him.

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm Takashima Zakuro."

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha, r-right. I'm sorry."

name: Mamiya
message: "Where are you going, Takashima-san?"

name: Zakuro
message: "What about you? Where would you happen to be going?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Me? Ahahaha... I haven't actually decided yet."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahaha... Really? M-Me too."
Nice one. I'm surprised I was able to say that so smoothly... I'm doing really good today.
Sorry, but my favorite voice actress is going to have to wait until tomorrow.

name: Mamiya
message: "The weather is nice... I was just going to ride the train until I knew where I wanted to go."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, really..."
M-Me too!
W-Would you like to go somewhere together?
That's what I wanted to say...
Instead, I just whispered it in my heart.
What I said in reality was...

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahahaha..."
I just smiled, like if someone had spoken to me in a foreign language and I didn't know what to say.
I have to do something...

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Aren't you getting off here? This is Suginomiya."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, yeah... What about you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Like I said, I'm not going anywhere in particular... I wouldn't mind getting off here, but it might be nice to keep going, too."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see..."

name: Mamiya
message: "So you really don't have anywhere to go either, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No... Also, could you call me Zakuro, instead of just saying 'you'?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Why?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I think that's the reason you can't ever remember my name. You never call me by it."

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha, does it really matter if I don't remember?"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's for me to decide, not you. I want you to remember it."

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahahaha... All right."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I'm sorry. That was rude."

name: Mamiya
message: "No, not at all. You're right."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Then please call me Zakuro."

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't think I could get used to that."

name: Zakuro
message: "But we've talked so much lately..."
Maybe I'm the only one who feels like that, though...
From the way he reacts to me... it's like I'm nothing more than an acquaintance.
I wish I could talk to him more often.
Maybe then he would remember my name...
Maybe not...
Just thinking that is probably ridiculous.

name: Mamiya
message: "Do you like to read books, Takashima-san?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? Yes, sort of..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Do you read anything other than Lewis Carroll?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Sometimes, but I'm not that well read. I just read simple stuff. I like short stories."

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? Like what?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Like Atouda... and of course Tsutsui Yasutaka. I like Hoshi Shinichi too..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, I read those when I was younger too. I really loved Tsutsui Yasutaka. Oh, and Hoshi Shinichi and Atouda Takashi were great too."

name: Zakuro
message: "R-Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Atouda was a bit much for me when I was a grade schooler, but maybe that was a good thing. They were so exciting, I always climbed under the covers when I read them."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahaha... Under the covers..."
I felt my face flush... That's right. Atouda's books had a lot more sexual illustrations in them.
I would've liked to have seen Mamiya-kun reading them as a child.

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, I still like short stories. Oh, that's right. Next time, I'll lend you another book. I think I know one you'll like."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? What kind of book?"

name: Mamiya
message: "It's a book by another Italian author, Buzzati. I thought it was really fascinating when I read it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Italy... That's the same as the author that wrote the story about the cat. You know a lot about Italian authors, huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, not at all. I just happened to have read them recently. If you had asked me a couple weeks earlier, I probably would've recommended you something different. Ahahahaha..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Like Marquez?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You know about Gabriel Garcia Marquez?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahaha, it just seemed like something you would like. I read it because my father recommended it to me."

name: Zakuro
message: "One day I couldn't sleep. My father was in the living room, and when I told him I couldn't sleep, he told me to read Chronicle of a Death Foretold ."

name: Mamiya
message: "And then?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I couldn't sleep at all. It was too interesting!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha, yeah, it is. Isn't it really short, though?"

name: Zakuro
message: "But still, I couldn't stop thinking about it after I finished it."

name: Mamiya
message: "I know what you mean."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe..."
It's so different...
Completely different.
Completely different... from my life before I met him.
I've never felt this way before.
I've never had such a dazzlingly wonderful time as today.
It makes me think... I wish I could keep talking to him for all eternity.
I might never have this much fun talking to anyone else in my entire life.
I just wish this moment would never end.
Though that wish could never come true.

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, the next..."

name: Mamiya
message: "The next?"

name: Zakuro
message: "The next station is the last stop."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh... We're already at the last stop."
It's already over.
It was so fun, and...
It's over...

name: Mamiya
message: "Where's the last stop?"

name: Zakuro
message: "It says it's an amusement park..."

name: Mamiya
message: "An amusement park, huh? I guess I don't have any reason to go there. Maybe I should ride it back to the beginning."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well then... Huh?"
I silently pulled on Mamiya-kun's hand.
I was bold... or maybe I was just confused.
I grabbed his hand and descended onto the platform with him just before the doors closed.
I didn't want the wonderful time I spent with him to end so anticlimactically, so I...
Crunch, crunch...
Crunch, crunch...

name: Mamiya
message: "Shaved ice is great in the summer."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? Why?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Well, I dragged you off the train and made you come here."

name: Mamiya
message: "Really? I don't mind. I didn't have anything to do anyway, and I got a nice treat out of it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... I'm sorry."

name: Mamiya
message: "Like I said, you don't need to apologize."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "There are a lot of people here for such a run-down amusement park... It must be busy because it's Sunday."

name: Zakuro
message: "You shouldn't say that."

name: Mamiya
message: "I mean, I heard most of the smaller amusement parks had to shut down. They're definitely doing a good job of attracting customers, at least."

name: Zakuro
message: "Maybe that just means it's more fun than any of the other amusement parks?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You could be right."

name: Zakuro
message: "It's my treat. Let's have fun, okay?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You don't have to pay. But yeah, let's have fun... I haven't been to an amusement park in years."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sure!"
Ahahahaha.
I'm such a weird girl.
What am I doing?
Last night I decided to keep my feelings inside...
And I ended up forcibly dragging him along on a date...
Wait!

name: Zakuro
message: "A d-date?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, i-i-i-it's nothing!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Really? I was just thinking, coming here together on Sunday like this kind of feels like a date."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Would you rather I didn't put it like that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "P-Please, go right ahead! It's an honor, really. I don't mind at all!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahahaha... It's not a big deal."
Noo! Why am I getting so flustered?!
He must think I'm strange! He must think I'm weird! He must think I'm a freak!

name: Mamiya
message: "You're a little weirder than I thought you were."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah!"
Crap!
Come on, it was all going so well! Now he knows I'm a freak!
Now he won't look at me the same way... He must think I'm gross.

name: Mamiya
message: "I guess that's why..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oogh..."
That's why...

name: Mamiya
message: "That's why I feel like I can relax, even though I don't usually like other people."
Look, he said it. He thinks I'm disgust―What?
Huh? Huh? Huh? Relax?

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm pretty strange myself... I can't usually relax around other people, but I can when I'm with you."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm?"

name: Mamiya
message: "What's wrong? You haven't said anything in a while, and your face is all red... Are you feeling all right?"
He worriedly put his hand on my forehead... Wait, his hand?!

name: Zakuro
message: "N-No, that's not it!"
Ah, I slapped his hand away!

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, okay..."
Aaah, I'm sorry, Mamiya-kun! The truth is I wanted you to touch me, but I couldn't think and...
Now it feels awkward...
Because I slapped his hand away.
Ah, what should I do? Maybe I should grab his hand and stick it up my skirt?
No, that would only make me happy. Mamiya-kun wouldn't like it at all! If I did that, I really would be a freak!
Ahh... I'm so confused...
Uh... Uh...

name: Mamiya
message: "What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm sorry... I don't have a fever or anything like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I just haven't ever done this with anyone before, so I'm really nervous."

name: Mamiya
message: "You've never walked around like this with someone? Ahahahaha, you're such a shut-in."
No! That's a misunderstanding! I mean with a boy!!

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm the same, though."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? But Mamiya-kun, you said you go out like this a lot."

name: Mamiya
message: "I just like to go someplace on my free days so I don't have to talk to anyone. I guess I'm not a shut-in, but I am pretty reclusive."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, I guess so."

name: Mamiya
message: "Most people who like books don't like people. People who are good at everything, who like books, people, are good at sports, and who are really smart on top of all that just creep me out."

name: Zakuro
message: "Aren't those people to look up to?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I guess so. I think people like that are creepy, though."
I couldn't help myself. I grabbed his hand.
He seemed surprised when I did that, so I immediately...

name: Zakuro
message: "Look there, Mamiya-kun. That looks like fun!"
I tried to play it off like that.
It's like I can't hold myself back when I'm with him.

name: Mamiya
message: "I see... You like the screamers, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "A-Aha, aha..."
Actually, I hate them.
I just pointed at the first thing I saw, and it was a screamer.
But to keep up the ruse, I had to rise to the challenge.
And now... I feel like I'm going to hurl.

name: Mamiya
message: "A-Are you all right? You don't look too good."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahahaha... I might've overdone it."

name: Mamiya
message: "Would something a bit more relaxing be better?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Something relaxing?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, like that..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-Wh-What?! That's a haunted house! How is that relaxing?!"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, well, you can walk around on your own legs, so I figured it would be more relaxing than the last one... and it's dark."

name: Zakuro
message: "The dark makes your blood pressure rise!"

name: Mamiya
message: "That's not true. Everyone's blood pressure would go up at night if it was."
My blood pressure definitely goes up when I'm lying in bed!
That's a little vulgar, though... I can't say that.
Oh, this is no good... I should stop reading vulgar books. My internal jokes are becoming too crude.

name: Zakuro
message: "I guess so..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then what would you prefer?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Could we just walk around for a while?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, sure... I don't mind at all."

name: Mamiya
message: "What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I just remembered... There are boats here..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Boats? Oh, do you think that would be relaxing?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? You wouldn't mind?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Mind what?"
Everything! The two of us alone on a boat... That's the classic way of ending a date.

name: Mamiya
message: "I hope you're not thinking that I wouldn't be able to row the boat."

name: Zakuro
message: "N-Not at all... But you don't mind?"

name: Mamiya
message: "If you'd like to, then I'd be more than happy to help."
He waved his hand, inviting me on like a gallant prince.
He really understands a woman's heart, which means he must have been on dates with other women before.
I've never seen anyone who was this good with the ladies.
He seems like a total playboy... Actually, it seems like only another woman could understand women this well.
But...
It doesn't matter whether he's a playboy or even if he's a girl.

name: Zakuro
message: "L-Let's go."
Creek... Creek...
Creek... Creek...

name: Zakuro
message: "You're really good."

name: Mamiya
message: "Really? I don't think I'm that good."

name: Zakuro
message: "Have you taken a lot of girls on boat rides like this?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Why would I do that? Besides, I don't think you can really be exceptionally good or bad at this."

name: Zakuro
message: "I wonder about that."
But I think you can be exceptionally good or bad with women.

name: Mamiya
message: "Are you all right? You're not feeling seasick, are you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, I'm perfectly fine. I feel great."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's good."

name: Zakuro
message: "It really feels good out on the water."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right... If there was a bit of shade too, I'd forget that it's summer at all."
Mamiya-kun brushed his hair back after a breeze came across the water.
His movement was incredibly graceful... I felt drawn to the exposed white skin of his neck.

name: Zakuro
message: "I-I'm sorry for making you row."

name: Mamiya
message: "Wh-Whoa, it's fine. That's dangerous!"
I tried to take the oars from him.
The boat tilted back and forth, and Mamiya-kun got mad at me.
Floating on the surface of the water with just a few pieces of wood like this... It felt like we had left reality behind.
Maybe we really did, right when our feet left the shore.
And what's more, the person sitting in front of me was Mamiya-kun.
I felt nervous.

name: Zakuro
message: "I-It feels nice, but at the same time... I feel kind of uneasy out here."

name: Mamiya
message: "Why's that?"
There wasn't a reason... I just said it. I was just talking about how I felt.

name: Zakuro
message: "The surface of the water looks like the sky in the world of mirrors... It feels like we're on the precipice."

name: Mamiya
message: "I see what you mean, but I think it's nice. It's like we're sailing through the clouds."
Mamiya-kun touched the surface of the water with his fingertips.
Every time he touched the water sky... it warped and distorted.

name: Zakuro
message: "I wonder if it would feel good to walk through the clouds."

name: Mamiya
message: "Who knows? I've never done it, so I couldn't tell you. All I know is that I feel good right now."

name: Zakuro
message: "I see..."
I moved to touch the surface of the water too, but I stopped once I realized I was tipping the boat.

name: Zakuro
message: "The sky reflected in the water might not be the real sky, but maybe the real sky is too far for us to grasp."

name: Mamiya
message: "The real sky? Hehe... What's the real sky?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? I'm just talking about the sky reflected in the water and the sky above our heads..."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's true, but the sky I see is simply reflected in my eyes."

name: Mamiya
message: "You might not be able to say that the sky in the water is fake... or that the real sky is too far."

name: Mamiya
message: "The sky that you think of as so far is actually reflected in your eyes."

name: Mamiya
message: "The sky is only far because we assume it so... Otherwise, everything would be far off... Everything would be out of reach."
The words he said were too hard for me to understand... I couldn't grasp the meaning behind his words.
But they gave me courage.
Creek... Creek...
Creek... Creek...

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehe."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm? What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, nothing. I was just thinking, maybe for you, the sky really is within reach."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Why's that?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Well, that's how I understood your words."

name: Mamiya
message: "The sky is within reach, huh? I guess so."

name: Mamiya
message: "Just like this."
He raised his hands up toward the great blue sky.

name: Mamiya
message: "Am I touching the sky? Or am I not?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe. Who knows?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You know, I think that's just like the blue bird."

name: Zakuro
message: "The blue bird?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yes, the mystical blue bird... A blue bird that no one could ever hope to catch... But I think it's actually really easy to catch it."
After he said that, he laughed.
As I looked at his face, I...
Ah... This is bad...
That's what I thought.
The train home.
It felt nice. Our languid spirits swayed back and forth with the movement of the train.
And then...
Music.
Mamiya-kun let me listen to his music.
After watching my expression as he played a few songs for me, he focused on one genre.
He picked out songs he thought I would like...
Classic songs that I wasn't sure whether I had heard before.
Bright, jovial music.
He told me the recording was from a New Year's concert they hold every year in a foreign country.
A conductor who was lauded as a genius, leading the most famous philharmonic in the world.
Waltz.
Polka.
March.
A dancing melody.
The swaying of the train seemed to match the rhythm of the songs.
He put his hand on the music player, and I silently moved my hand on top of his.
Fittingly, the name on the screen was Vergnugungszug, 'Journey Train.'
This was just a ride across town, not a journey, but the relaxed feeling was the same, and the song almost made the scenery outside look like it was glowing.
Our hands moved ever so slightly, tapping out the rhythm of the song.
The instant I felt the warmth of his hand, the music seemed to grow even more lively and beautiful.

name: Zakuro
message: "You really know a lot."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, my mother used to be really strict, and she made me practice the piano."

name: Zakuro
message: "You can play the piano, then?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, a little bit. Not very well, though."

name: Zakuro
message: "What can you play?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm not sure, but I guess the last thing I played was a piece by Liszt. It was really hard."

name: Zakuro
message: "Play it for me next time."

name: Mamiya
message: "No, I definitely can't play Liszt anymore. Maybe something else, though... What composers do you like?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh? I don't know much about classical music, but what about La campanella?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No... The piano version of La campanella was by Liszt, so only virtuosi can play it."

name: Zakuro
message: "R-Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "How about something a little easier... How about Twinkle Twinkle Little Star?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, that would be nice."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, uh... That was a joke. You weren't supposed to go along with it like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "I told you, I don't know anything about classical music."

name: Mamiya
message: "I wonder... What would be good..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well, if anything comes to mind, I'd be happy to play it for you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe... Okay. That might be nice."

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you for everything today."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh?
Why are you thanking me?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh... I was the one who dragged you along into the amusement park..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Like I said, I didn't have anywhere to go. Besides, it was a lot of fun."

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh? What did you say?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I said it was a lot of fun."

name: Zakuro
message: "R-Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Really. I wouldn't've stuck around if it wasn't. I might not look like it, but I really don't get along with most people."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh, really... Well, I'm glad you had fun... I really am."

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, so I should be thanking you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, that store..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Hmm? What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah... Uh, nothing."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, okay...
Do you want to get something to eat?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You don't mind?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Of course not. We've been together all day."

name: Zakuro
message: "Then I'll pay."

name: Mamiya
message: "No way. This time it's my turn to treat you.
Now then, what should we eat? Japanese? Chinese? Italian? Beef bowls? French is too expensive though, so I'll have to veto that."

name: Zakuro
message: "That's okay. I've never had French anyway."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then maybe we really should eat French."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe... You don't need to do that."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then what about the place I always go to?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Where's that?"

name: Mamiya
message: "It has Japanese, Chinese, Italian, beef bowls, whatever you want."

name: Zakuro
message: "Like a bistro or something?"

name: Mamiya
message: "You'll see when we get there. Don't be shy now. Let's go."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, okay."

name: Mamiya
message: "What do you think?"

name: Zakuro
message: "...Eh? Isn't this a bar?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Don't worry about that. Come on, sit here."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, there's a piano."

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right. They have a piano."

name: Mamiya
message: "Actually, I have a job here playing piano."

name: Zakuro
message: "Y-You do?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah... This store's master has helped me out since I was a child."

name: Mamiya
message: "But more importantly, what would you like to hear?
Oh wait, you hadn't decided, right?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No, I've decided now."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, you have?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, it's, well..."

name: Mamiya
message: "What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Play every song that you thought about playing for me."

name: Mamiya
message: "What?!"

name: Master
message: "Oh, Yu-... No, wait, Mamiya-chan."
Hello..."

name: Master
message: "You don't have a shift today. Are you a customer?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Of course I am."

name: Zakuro
message: "But you'll still play, right?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Ugh... I guess so."

name: Master
message: "Oh, really?
So you brought your girlfriend along after a date to show off?"

name: Master
message: "And you brought her here. Haha."

name: Mamiya
message: "What are you laughing about?"

name: Master
message: "Oh, you're awfully mouthy today. I guess that's because your girlfriend's here?"

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, well, uh..."
Ah... He keeps saying girlfriend... Why would he do that...

name: Mamiya
message: "Now wait a second. She's just a friend from school, and we just happened to see each other. She's not my girlfriend!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah."
Aha... Ahaha...
That's right, isn't it...
But it kind of stings when you say it like that, Mamiya-kun.

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah... Y-Yes, I'm just a girl that goes to the same school as Mamiya-kun."

name: Master
message: "Really? But she's so pretty."

name: Zakuro
message: "Wh-What, no I'm not. Everyone says I'm ugly... Oh, wait, that was a compliment, wasn't it?"

name: Master
message: "What's she talking about? Is she stupid? It's not like I have any reason to give a girl a compliment."

name: Mamiya
message: "She doesn't seem to get along well with most people. Don't bully her too much, Master."

name: Master
message: "Oh, she doesn't? Sounds just like you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really? He doesn't seem that way to me."

name: Master
message: "That's right. He just plays the piano, never talks to anyone. He's not attractive at all."

name: Mamiya
message: "That so? I like to think of myself as very attractive, actually."

name: Master
message: "Well, sometimes you are, but... Anyway, what do you want to eat?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, can I get a menu?"

name: Master
message: "There's no menu. I can make whatever you ask for. That's how this shop works."

name: Mamiya
message: "The rice here is pretty good. Master here is a fag, but everything else about this shop is really good."

name: Master
message: "Come on... I don't know how to respond when you insult me and then compliment me in the same sentence."

name: Mamiya
message: "Anyway, I'll take chicken ramen with eggs and celery on the side. Oh, and if you could get me the key to the piano, too."

name: Master
message: "Sure, sure..."
Master took the key from his pocket and threw it to Mamiya-kun.

name: Master
message: "But don't play any depressing songs."

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, don't worry. I'm not in that kind of mood."
As Mamiya-kun stood in front of the piano... he looked incredibly cool.

name: Mamiya
message: "Well... First, we'll start off with something simple."
He slowly spread his fingers over the keys.
He closed his eyes for a moment and then...
His fingers danced.
As he struck the keys, layers of different tones flowed out of the piano.
The music wove a tapestry of good cheer.
It was a happy rhythm.
Bright.
Ornate.
And somehow nostalgic.
It felt simple and candid.

name: Zakuro
message: "I've heard this song before."

name: Mamiya
message: "What's the song called, and who wrote it? If you get it right, I'll play another one for you."

name: Master
message: "It's Satie... Piccadilly, right?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I wasn't asking you!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yay, one more!"

name: Mamiya
message: "But you didn't answer..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm sorry."

name: Master
message: "Don't be cheap. Play her another one."

name: Mamiya
message: "Shut up."

name: Zakuro
message: "You don't want to?"

name: Mamiya
message: "No... It's not that I don't want to..."

name: Master
message: "I won't charge you for your meal, so play her another song."

name: Mamiya
message: "Seriously? You mean it's free?"

name: Master
message: "Like I said, play her something. Play something moody for her."

name: Mamiya
message: "You know moody basically means the same thing as depressing..."

name: Master
message: "I don't care what the word means. You know what I'm trying to say."

name: Mamiya
message: "I'm not sure I do."

name: Master
message: "What? What are you trying to say?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, nothing... Well, let's forget about that. Now, about that song..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Takashima-san..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"
Mamiya-kun looked at me.

name: Mamiya
message: "That's right... I'll play a song that reminds me of you."

name: Zakuro
message: "A song that reminds you of me?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Yeah, a song that captures the image you conjure in my mind."

name: Zakuro
message: "Sure."

name: Mamiya
message: "Well then..."
He faced the piano and closed his eyes again.
Then he spread his hands across the keys, and...
The music began.
What is this song? I've never heard this before...
It's like... the sky. Or maybe the ocean. I'm not sure, but it feels like someone is moving through something transparent.
The melody made me feel strange... He seemed to be tracing an outline on the keyboard... No, the outline was wholly shapeless. It was more akin to a texture.
Like something fantastical... Like something in a dream...
The feeling of touching blue... An incredibly cold, pleasant blue.
The blue sensation filled my body. The piano's sound changed into texture, and the tone changed into a translucent color.
The endless, endlessly extensive blue inevitably melds with the red, the orange, the purple, and eventually the sky turns blue.
His sounds turned to color.
The colors turned to ocean, then to sky, then again to ocean.
Then the sky turned to a much greater celestial sphere.
The timbre of the celestial sphere.
It is heard not by the ears but by the body.
Like a creature in the water... feeling the water with its entire body.
The world within the celestial sphere.
Everything is subsumed within it. It has a nigh endless scope.
The blue sky.
The blue ocean.
The white clouds.
The white waves.
It's just like the world.
It's just like... a dream.
It's just like...

name: Mamiya
message: "What is it?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh? D-Didn't you like it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh... I'm sorry. U-Um, I was so moved that..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Then you liked it?"
He never did tell me what song that was... All I knew was that Mamiya-kun played a song he liked for me.
And in the end...

name: Mamiya
message: "What do you mean, it's not free?!"

name: Master
message: "Like I said, only the chicken ramen and the celery was free."

name: Mamiya
message: "Wait, you mean only mine was free?!"

name: Master
message: "That's right. I'm already doing you a favor. Chicken ramen isn't cheap."

name: Mamiya
message: "You can buy ramen for 60 yen."

name: Master
message: "Shut up and pay me for the margarita pizza, the caesar salad, and the Russian tea."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, I can pay for it."

name: Master
message: "Shut up. The man is supposed to pay for this, so let him pay."

name: Zakuro
message: "O-Oh... I'm sorry..."

name: Master
message: "And please stop apologizing all the time."

name: Master
message: "I find it kind of hard to believe you actually think you're ugly, but I'll go ahead and say it just in case."

name: Master
message: "There are a lot of brats who hate people just for being different. They only say that about you because you're so beautiful and you have such a nice body."

name: Master
message: "Once you grow up, everyone will be hitting on you. You're not ugly at all."

name: Zakuro
message: "A-All right..."

name: Master
message: "And you. Hurry up and pay me already."

name: Mamiya
message: "Jeez..."
